reason:
Agent attempted to use GitHub tool to retrieve username but encountered OAuth authentication error instead of returning username
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub OAuth token authentication failure - The agent was unable to retrieve the GitHub username due to a 502 proxy error when attempting to fetch the OAuth access token. Error message: "The proxy returned a 502 — it can't fetch a valid OAuth access token for the connected GitHub account, so I can't authenticate against the GitHub API right now."
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent app displaying sidebar with available agents
Click on agent "QA-20260505-181028-yjqe" in sidebar — Agent detail page opened successfully
Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (visible in status indicator)
Click message input field — Input field focused successfully
Type message: "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message typed successfully in input field
Click "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, new session "GitHub Username Verification Query" created with "working" status
Wait for responses and check for account access cards — First card appeared: "Request Connected Account" asking to grant GitHub access after ~10 seconds
Click "Allow Access (1)" button — GitHub account access granted, agent status changed to "working"
Wait for next response — Agent began executing Bash tool "Fetch authenticated GitHub user", then requested API permission for GET /user endpoint
Click "Allow" button for first API request and confirm "Allow Once" in dialog — API request approved, agent continued processing
Wait for agent to continue — Second API request appeared for same GET /user endpoint
Click "Allow" button for second API request and confirm "Allow Once" in dialog — API request approved, agent executed "Verbose curl to GitHub through proxy" bash command

Wait for agent to complete final processing — After 2m 33s total elapsed time, agent completed with error response instead of GitHub username. Response stated proxy could not fetch valid OAuth access token for connected GitHub account
Take screenshot of response — Screenshot captured showing error message and completed agent session
bugs: GitHub OAuth token authentication failure - The agent was unable to retrieve the GitHub username due to a 502 proxy error when attempting to fetch the OAuth access token. Error message: "The proxy returned a 502 — it can't fetch a valid OAuth access token for the connected GitHub account, so I can't authenticate against the GitHub API right now."
